# Raven-winged Helm

> [!danger] ⚔️ Attachment · Cost: **2** · Tactics

![[10005.png]]

*Item. Armor.*

---

Attach a hero with Sentinel. Limit 1 per hero.
**Response:** Exhaust Raven-winged Helm to prevent 1 point of damage just dealt to attached character.
